categories.label: Defeated Monster Glory
categories.description: Glory printed on each defeated monster card (trolls, draugr, journey monsters)

categories.label: Monster Set Bonus
categories.description: Bonus Glory for collecting sets of different monster types

categories.label: Leader Bonus Glory
categories.description: Bonus Glory from leader card end-game conditions

categories.label: Blame Penalty
categories.description: Each blame token is worth -3 Glory
